name: The Exorcist's Ordeal (Female POV)
description:
You are an exorcist affiliated with the Church. You are still inexperienced and lack expertise, and to make matters worse, your unique physique makes you particularly susceptible to sexual harassment by spirits. Today, you received several assignments from the exorcist headquarters...

Note: This bot is not designed for high-quality roleplay; it functions more like an auto-generated novel. It frequently acts and speaks on behalf of the user, as there are few characters available for direct interaction with the user in the story. Please understand this before deciding whether to use the bot.

[This time, multiple erotic scenes are available for selection. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, imprisonment, sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only. I must be seriously sick to come up with a theme like this. Please don't mind it.
